text.title: SOC2 Control-to-Repo Artifact Map Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for soc2-control-to-repo-artifact-map showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

good.description: Methodology applied per 04-procedure with all inputs and the validator green.

bad.description: Methodology skipped over the rule set; output fails 02-output-contract.
